SEARCH

Uses of Class
cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice

Packages that use SensorDevice
Package
Description
cpdt.simulator.devices
Contains implementations of simulated devices, including sensors and future actuators.
cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.

  • Uses of SensorDevice in cpdt.simulator.devices

    Subclasses of SensorDevice in cpdt.simulator.devices
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FlowSensor
    Represents a simulated Differential Pressure (DP) Flow Meter used within the chemical plant simulation.
    class 
    GasSensor
    Represents a simulated Gas Detection Sensor used within the chemical plant simulation.
    class 
    LevelSensor
    Represents a simulated Guided Wave or Non-Contact Radar Level Transmitter used within the chemical plant simulation.
    class 
    PhSensor
    Represents a simulated glass-electrode pH Sensor used within the chemical plant simulation.
    class 
    PressureSensor
    Represents a simulated piezoresistive pressure transmitter used within the chemical plant simulation.
    class 
    TemperatureSensor
    Represents a simulated resistance temperature detector similar to a Pt100 RTD used within the chemical plant simulation.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SimulatorEngine(List<SensorDevice> sensors, TelemetryPublisher telemetryPublisher, ScenarioEngine scenarioEngine)
    Creates a new simulator engine with the required simulation components.
